summary: Completed comprehensive testing of German medical onboarding app iteration 12 features. All critical backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly. Progress tracking, user history timeline, and email template customization features are fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns completion_pct for all users
Backend: GET /api/admin/users/{id} returns history array and completion_pct
Backend: GET /api/steps/history returns progress history entries
Backend: History entries have correct structure with required fields
Frontend: Admin Users tab displays PROGRESS column with visual progress bars
Frontend: User detail dialog shows completion percentage bar at top
Frontend: User detail dialog shows 'Verlauf' (History) timeline with colored dots
Frontend: Step editor Benachrichtigungen section shows email toggles
Frontend: Template variables box displays {user_name}, {step_title} variables
Frontend: 'Bei Schritt-Abschluss' toggle reveals subject and HTML body editors
Frontend: Template editors show placeholder content with variable substitution
